zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hesketh是Sir William Thomas Heskethe和Sybyl Lawrence的兒子，出生。他於1440年與Margaret Massey在英國藍卡爾盧福德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1463年10月8日在英國藍卡爾盧福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hesketh是Sir William Thomas Heskethe和Sybyl Lawrence的儿子，出生。他于1440年与Margaret Massey在英国藍卡爾盧福德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1463年10月8日在英国藍卡爾盧福德。

nameMeanings.name: Hesketh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from Hesketh (Lancashire), Hesketh Grange in Felixkirk (North Yorkshire), or Hesket in the Forest (Cumberland). The placenames derive from Old Norse hestr ‘horse, stallion’ + skeith ‘course, track, race course’. The ancient Scandinavians were fond of horse-racing and horse-fighting, and introduced both pastimes to England.

variants.name: Heskett
meanings: English (Cumberland and Lancashire): variant of   Hesketh  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hesketh was born as the son of Sir William Thomas Heskethe and Sybyl Lawrence. He married Margaret Massey in 1440, in Rufford, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 October 1463, in Rufford, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hesketh est né, fils de Sir William Thomas Heskethe et Sybyl Lawrence. Il a épousé Margaret Massey en 1440, à Rufford, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1463, à Rufford, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hesketh wurde, als Sohn von Sir William Thomas Heskethe und Sybyl Lawrence geboren. Er hat 1440 in Rufford, Lancashire, England Margaret Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1463 in Rufford, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hesketh è nato il come figlio di Sir William Thomas Heskethe e Sybyl Lawrence. Lui sposato Margaret Massey nel 1440, nel Rufford, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 ottobre 1463, nel Rufford, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas HeskethはSir William Thomas HesketheとSybyl Lawrenceの息子として生まれた。1440年にイギリスランカシュアイアルフォードでMargaret Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1463年10月8日にイギリスランカシュアイアルフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hesketh(은)는 Sir William Thomas Heskethe(와)과 Sybyl Lawrence의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1440년 영국 랭카실르 루퍼드에서 Margaret Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 10월 8일 영국 랭카실르 루퍼드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hesketh nasceu filho de Sir William Thomas Heskethe e Sybyl Lawrence. Ele casou-se com Margaret Massey em 1440, em Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1463, em Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hesketh родился. Его родителей звали Sir William Thomas Heskethe и Sybyl Lawrence. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Massey в 1440 г. в местности руффорд, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 октября 1463 г. в местности руффорд, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Hesketh nació como hijo de Sir William Thomas Heskethe y Sybyl Lawrence. Se casó con Margaret Massey en 1440, en Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1463, en Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
